description: Cheap unguarded canary for the local Dockerized stack. Probes representative RPC, indexer, API, and UI endpoints. If the stack is down, it starts it automatically and may wipe ephemeral local data if startup is still unhealthy.

services.name: hardhat rpc
services.recoveryHint: This check automatically runs ../scripts/services.sh --start from the verifier workspace, and if needed ../scripts/data.sh --wipe followed by ../scripts/services.sh --start. If Hardhat is still down, inspect the hardhat service logs with docker compose logs hardhat.

services.name: indexer graphql
services.recoveryHint: This check automatically runs ../scripts/services.sh --start from the verifier workspace, and if needed ../scripts/data.sh --wipe followed by ../scripts/services.sh --start. If the indexer is still down or stuck, inspect docker compose logs indexer.

services.name: platform api health
services.recoveryHint: This check automatically runs ../scripts/services.sh --start from the verifier workspace, and if needed ../scripts/data.sh --wipe followed by ../scripts/services.sh --start. If platform-api is still down, inspect docker compose logs platform-api.

services.name: ui shell
services.recoveryHint: This check automatically runs ../scripts/services.sh --start from the verifier workspace, and if needed ../scripts/data.sh --wipe followed by ../scripts/services.sh --start. If the UI is still down, inspect docker compose logs ui.
